case_title: CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES VS. JOHN H BYE et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES CONFERENCE BOARD ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BYE, JOHN H INDIVIDUALLY BYE, JOHN H INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS FABCO SUPPLY COMPANY FABCO SUPPLY COMPANY $34,107.21 PRINCIPAL, $1,548.75 ATTORNEY FEES, $925.55 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $36,581.51, SEE SCANNED DOC
